title: Enhanced Mobs
description: Makes mobs stronger, tougher, and follow you from over 100 blocks away, perfect for hardcore challenges!
body:
# Enhanced Mobs
This simple yet chaotic pack increases the game difficulty by enhancing mobs in a simple way

## Increased Stats
For all mobs excluding players:
Attack damage is increased by 50%
Movement speed is increased by 15%
Follow range is increased by +50 blocks and amplified by 50%
Max health is increased by 50%
